introSection: Rapterra is a steel launched winged roller coaster located at Kings Dominion in Doswell, Virginia, USA. It was manufactured by Bolliger & Mabillard and opened on March 29, 2025. It is the tallest, longest, and second fastest launched wing coaster.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
Rapterra was announced by Kings Dominion on July 31, 2024.

The train was revealed at the 2024 IAAPA Expo in Orlando, Florida, USA.

Rapterra opened on March 29, 2025.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: Rapterra is a custom Wing Coaster from Bolliger & Mabillard, and has 3 inversions.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: 2 trains with 5 cars per train. Riders are arranged 4 across in a single row for a total of 20 riders per train.

fullText:
Rapterra is a steel launched winged roller coaster located at Kings Dominion in Doswell, Virginia, USA. It was manufactured by Bolliger & Mabillard and opened on March 29, 2025. It is the tallest, longest, and second fastest launched wing coaster.

Rapterra was announced by Kings Dominion on July 31, 2024.

The train was revealed at the 2024 IAAPA Expo in Orlando, Florida, USA.

Rapterra opened on March 29, 2025.

Rapterra is a custom Wing Coaster from Bolliger & Mabillard, and has 3 inversions.

2 trains with 5 cars per train. Riders are arranged 4 across in a single row for a total of 20 riders per train.
